items.name_cn:
➫ SPEEDY 20 Series #M45957# SP Uninspected Version Exclusive YY#
🔘Size: 20*13*12cm
As a Speedy series, it is a classic flagship of the Little Pony family. It has always been a favorite of the Speedy family. The new Speedy model is eye-catching. The detachable wide shoulder strap design gives it a fresh and unique look! As a new member of the Speedy family, this size is more perfect! It is another out-of-stock hit with stunning looks. Compared to the Nano size, it is more suitable for daily use. A must-have to add to your collection, it looks amazing!!

items.name_en: ⭐️Accurate development⭐️Perfect details⭐️Original hardware✈️【PETIT PALAIS Large handbag】 m58914 45898 Monogram. The Grand Palais handbag features a soft grained calfskin embossed with a large Monogram pattern, continuing Louis Vuitton's travel spirit with a nameplate and padlock. Neat compartments and pockets make it convenient for storage, and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for handheld, elbow, and crossbody carrying.

items.name_en: ⭐️Accurate development⭐️Perfect details⭐️Original quality【Wallet on Strap handbag】M81399 M81398 Blue M81400 Yellow (embroidered)
items.name_cn:
⭐️Accurate development⭐️Perfect details⭐️Original quality【Wallet on Strap handbag】M81399 M81398 Blue M81400 Yellow (embroidered)
This Wallet on Strap handbag is from the Bubblegram collection, featuring soft, lined calfskin with a classic Monogram embroidery pattern. The magnetic flap opens to a trendy configuration, and the dynamic nylon strap allows for shoulder and crossbody carrying; removing the strap transforms it into an evening clutch.
Size 20.0 x 12.0 x 6.0 cm

items.name_en: ⭐️Close to Original⭐️Perfect Details⭐️Original Hardware【DIANE Handbag】 M46317 French Toast Winter Wool Collection
items.name_cn:
⭐️Close to Original⭐️Perfect Details⭐️Original Hardware【DIANE Handbag】 M46317 French Toast Winter Wool Collection
This Diane handbag combines soft-colored wool leather with classic Monogram canvas, joining the 2022 Winter Cozygram capsule collection with a fresh look. Distressed cowhide trim adorns the bag, paired with dazzling metal hardware to release charming allure. Removable top handle and leather long shoulder strap offer multiple carrying options.
Size: 24 x 15 x 9 cm

items.name_en: ⭐️Close to Original⭐️Perfect Details⭐️Original Hardware【LOCKME EVER Mini Handbag】 M21088 Blush, M20997 Black, M21502 Khaki
items.name_cn:
⭐️Close to Original⭐️Perfect Details⭐️Original Hardware【LOCKME EVER Mini Handbag】 M21088 Blush, M20997 Black, M21502 Khaki
This season, the petite Lockme Ever mini handbag is dyed in stylish new colors of grained calfskin. Exquisite lines and the iconic LV lock convey a trendy style, while the elegant woven chain strap offers crossbody or shoulder carry options, and the top handle makes handheld carrying look more gentle. A great choice for day and night.
Size: 23 x 17 x 10 cm

items.name_en: ⭐️Exact match development⭐️Perfect details⭐️Original hardware [OVER THE MOON Handbag] M59799 Black, M59825 Blue, M59915 Pink, M59959 White, M59823 Yellow (embroidery embossing)
items.name_cn:
⭐️Exact match development⭐️Perfect details⭐️Original hardware [OVER THE MOON Handbag] M59799 Black, M59825 Blue, M59915 Pink, M59959 White, M59823 Yellow (embroidery embossing)
This Over The Moon handbag is crafted with supple calfskin to create a flexible silhouette, imbued with a sense of solemnity through Monogram embroidery. The adjustable shoulder strap and chain allow you to switch between elbow carry, short shoulder, crossbody, and long shoulder carry at will; remove the strap to transform it into an evening clutch.
Size: 27.5 x 16 x 7 cm

items.name_en: 🌈New Sade hobo is here! Black sheepskin material with a super soft texture 😎 Rhombus quilted sheepskin HOBO handbag LECASSANDRE. This fashionable and versatile handbag comes with a folding top handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying ways. Equipped with a thin long chain. A small bag that fits a phone completely, can be carried by hand or crossbody, so exquisite!

items.name_cn:
🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Black/Golden Vintage
▪ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's explodingly popular shoulder bag is finally here from Y!! The bag has a simple, structured silhouette, looking structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish 👍
Model: 713938 [Original Leather]
Size: 22x22x10cm
